subcodes.first_line: O peoples of earth and heaven! By God, He through Whom the eye of the world is solaced hath verily appeared, yet the nations remain in manifest doubt [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اهل الارض و السماء تالله قد اتی من قرت به عین العالم ولکن الامم فی ریب مبین
subcodes.subjects: @preservation; transcription of the Sacred Writings, @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @proclamation to the people of the world, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
